subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-27 in London
subcodes.first_line: A number of souls, destitute and famished, approached me and begged me to give them something to sustain them
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمعی فقرای بسیار گرسنه بمن رسیدند و سوال نمودند من آنها را حواله بدکان بقالی کردم
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @wealth inequality and its moderation
